title: Assembly Assembled
description: A cross between Create and Cobblemon, with many mods to help drive the player forward!
body:
An industrialized take on Cobblemon, where players need to work to survive, and Create to thrive. This modpack is made for small to medium groups, where economies can develop and players make their own adventure.

This modpack is intended to create interesting interactions with players by having them use mods like the simple voice chat to have live conversations, while using mods like Cobblemon and CC:Tweaked to have players battle together, trade, and cooperate. These mods, along with others like Armourer's Workshop and Joy of Painting, are used to develop an ecosystem for trade and economies.

Utilize the resources of the world to help you and others survive, as the increased difficulty added by temperature, as well as harsher hunger, force players to forge paths of specialization, coupled with the seasons mods to create more drastic worlds.

Will you become a Pokemon master, or sell your way to the top? The choice is yours.
